[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows an extreme close-up of a bright green cartoon-like character face filling most of the frame.  

Main Subject:  
A green, rounded head with an oval black-and-white eye on the left side of its face and another eye partially visible on the right; the character has a small black nose and a wide, simple mouth line. A thin black line crosses diagonally from the lower left toward the center.  

Setting:  
The background is out of focus and appears indoors or on a set-like backdrop, with warm brown and orange tones and vague shapes that do not resolve clearly. Lighting is even and soft, with no visible weather effects.  

Visual Details:  
The character’s skin is a vivid lime green with smooth shading and darker green outlines around facial features. The composition is tightly cropped, showing only the head and face. The black diagonal line looks like an overlay or artifact, not part of the character.  

Visible Text:  
No important visible text detected.  

Practical Summary:  
A bright green cartoon-like face is shown in a tightly framed close-up. The background is blurred and warm-toned, and a black diagonal line runs across the image.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- None

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to contain an image with no visible, legible text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

Gambar ini menampilkan karakter Mike Wazowski dari film Disney Pixar "Monsters, Inc.". Mike Wazowski adalah monster hijau besar dengan satu mata besar di tengah wajahnya, dan mulut yang kecil. Dia terlihat berdiri di latar belakang yang agak buram, dengan beberapa garis hitam yang menggores permukaan gambar.

Berdasarkan analisis gambar, tidak ada konten NSFW, pornografi, atau ketelanjangan yang terlihat.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
